title: Tracking due date changes?
excerpt:
Hi All, 
I am trying to find a way to track the number of times a deadline/due date has changed prior to completion. Does Monday.com have this capability? I tried asking AI but nothing popped up (although it may not be u…

posts.author: CJG (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

I am trying to find a way to track the number of times a deadline/due date has changed prior to completion. Does Monday.com have this capability? I tried asking AI but nothing popped up (although it may not be understanding me).

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
You’ll need to add a number column. For this example I named it ‘Due Date Changes’.

image1560×565 15.4 KB

posts.author: shirozayas (Shiro Zayas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Great automation suggestion, Desiree!

@Chris once you set up the automation Desiree suggested above, you can always revisit the Run History on the Automation Center for a detailed report of the activity:

image1277×360 26.1 KB

posts.author: CJG (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Desiree! Thank you so much!! This is great!!

posts.author: fabiozampieri (fabio zampieri)
posts.cookedHtml: Very useful, I am using it too.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @CJG ,
Alternatively, you can address this case with Board Email Reports app.
It provides the following types of reports.
On a board/project level:

  1. New and updated tasks
  2. Status updates
  3. Budget, Costs, Revenue changes
  4. Timeline and deadline overdue
  5. Timeline and deadline shifts
  6. Time Tracking changes

On an item/task level:

  • Updates by a specific employee
  • Updates mentioning a specific employee
  • Updates containing attachments
  • Status updates
  • Last updates

It aggregates the changes in the activity log by the column you choose and over the period you choose in the automation rule, and sends the xls-report to any people you mention in the rule (no guest access needed! ).
In your case you need the Timeline and deadline shifts report.
An example of the automation rule:

image1368×484 50.8 KB

The email you get will contain the xls-report with detailed and roundup of changes in the email body:
image463×479 20.8 KB

You can test the app for free and find out if it works better for you.
